note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: While Aether Augmentation is active, every 4th Scrap Shot now grants you Innate Brilliance.Innate Brilliance (Buff)Your next Scrap Shot has 5 yds increased range, deals 15% increased damage, and drains 125 + 10% ranged AP of your target's mana. Lasts 10 seconds.
Increases the effectiveness of Aether Augmentation by 50%.
While Piercing Augmentation or Aether Augmentation is active, your ranged haste is increased by 10%.

Air Strike.baseDescription:
Mark the target location for an Air Strike. After 7 seconds, it deals 1250 Fire damage to up to 12 enemies caught within the blast.

This ability always critically strikes.

modifyingTalents.description: Air Strike now drops Tear Gas, dealing 132 + 11% nature SP + 100% AP Nature damage every 2 sec for 12 seconds.

All nearby allies receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Alarm Beacon now dispels fear, charm, and sleep effects from 1 additional ally.

Auto Resuscitation Device.baseDescription:
Attach a resuscitation device to your target ally for 20 seconds.

When the target would otherwise die, they are instead healed for 50% of their maximum health.

modifyingTalents.description:
Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, the range of your offensive ranged abilities and Auto Shot is increased by 10 yds.
Casting Beacon abilities now reduces the cooldown of My Greatest Invention! by -20 sec.
Increases the duration of your Beacons by 5 sec and Med Pack by 3 sec.
Casting Repair Shot or Emergency Heal now has a 15% chance to refresh a charge of Beacons.

Bomb Builder.baseDescription: Increases your and your summons Fire Damage dealt by 5%.

Bomb Squad.baseDescription:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your Fire spell power by 50% of Agility.

Bomb Toss.baseDescription: Lob a bomb at an enemy, dealing 36 + 30% ranged AP + 50% fire SP Fire damage and reducing their armor by -5% for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Bomb Toss and Firepot Drone by 10%.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Build: Spider Bomb now resets the cooldown of Bomb Toss and causes your next Bomb Toss within 15 seconds to trigger no cooldown, global cooldown, or cost.
When you Bomb Toss, your Sentry Turret unleashes flames on your target, dealing 89+18+ranged AP*0.12+SPFI*0.4. Fire damage to enemies in a 30 yd line.

Build a Spider Bomb Factory in front of you for 20 seconds.

For the duration, Bomb Toss and Rocket Launcher will summon 3 Spider Bombs, that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage.

Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

Increases the amount of stacks of Tracer Augmentation by 5, and its duration by 7 sec, and causes damage dealt by Bomb Toss on enemies with 10 stacks to launch a Rocket Barrage at their location.Rocket Barrage (Damage)Deals 1290 + 17.5% AP + 11% fire SP Fire Damage to nearby enemies after 5 seconds.

Level 30 Passive
While Bombastic is active, your Bomb Tosses will additionally reduce the cooldown of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec.

Level 30 Passive
While Bombastic is active, your Bomb Tosses will additionally reduce the cooldown of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec.

Launch 3 Deathballs in a line, increasing in speed the further they travel.

They explode when they come into contact with an enemy, dealing 1150 + 35% ranged AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased based on distance traveled.

Bot and Build abilities reduce the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.

Launch 3 Deathballs in a line, increasing in speed the further they travel.

They explode when they come into contact with an enemy, dealing 1150 + 35% ranged AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased based on distance traveled.

Bot and Build abilities reduce the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.
Reduces the mana cost of all Build abilities by -25%.
Zap! now causes your active Build abilities to zap the lowest health nearby ally, healing them for 490 + 90% healing.
Reduces the cast time of Build abilities by -50%.

Build: Alarm Beacon.baseDescription:
3 Charges, 15 sec recharge
Throw down an alarm beacon for 10 seconds, removing fear, charm and sleep effects from up to 1 ally within 20 yds every 1 sec.

modifyingTalents.description: When you reach 5 stacks of Napalm on a target you refresh 1 charge of Build: Firepot Drone.

Build: Restorative Beacon.baseDescription:
3 Charges, 15 sec recharge
Throw down a restorative beacon for 15 seconds which projects a field that heals raid and party members in the area for 92 every 3 sec.

modifyingTalents.description: Build: Spider Bomb now creates an additional Spider Bomb that rushes towards your target.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Build: Spider Bomb now resets the cooldown of Bomb Toss and causes your next Bomb Toss within 15 seconds to trigger no cooldown, global cooldown, or cost.
Your Scrap Shot now ignores 25% of the target's Armor when damaging Burning targets.

Clockwork Ingenuity.baseDescription: Increases the maximum health of your summons by 10%.

Combat Symbiosis.baseDescription: Electrify an allies' body, increasing their haste by 20% and causing damage dealt by them to heal nearby allies for 15% of the value. Lasts for 15 seconds, or 20 attacks.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Spanner Smash will now apply Concussion to the target.ConcussionYour target is unable to critically strike and their total primary attributes are reduced by -5% for 8 seconds.

Launch 3 Deathballs in a line, increasing in speed the further they travel.

They explode when they come into contact with an enemy, dealing 1150 + 35% ranged AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased based on distance traveled.

Bot and Build abilities reduce the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Sticky Bomb and Deploy Blast Mine by -2 sec.

Build a Destructo-Bot that you can see through and directly control.

The bot is capable of exploding, dealing massive Fire damage to enemies nearby and disorienting them for 3 seconds.
Reduces the cooldown of Kinetic Shield, Discombobulate!, and Repulsion Unit by -20%.

Efficiency.baseDescription: Reduces the mana cost of all spells and abilities by -10%.

modifyingTalents.description: Direct healing critical strikes now increase the healing done by your next Repair Shot or Emergency Heal by 30% for 10 seconds.
Increases the healing and reduces the mana cost of Emergency Heal by -20%.
Casting Repair Shot or Emergency Heal now has a 15% chance to refresh a charge of Beacons.
Increases the critical strike chance of Emergency Heal by 15% and allows the periodic healing done by Med Pack to critically strike.

Damage dealt by Explosive Augmentation and Tracer Augmentation now has a 50% chance to apply an additional stack of Napalm to enemies.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

Explosive Personality.baseDescription: Increases your ranged attack power by 100% of your Intellect.

Explosives Expert.baseDescription: Direct harmful ability critical strikes from you or your summons now restores 4% of your maximum mana.

Field Medic.baseDescription: Increases your and your summons critical strike chance by 5%.

Fine Tuned.baseDescription: Increases the critical strike and hit chance of you and your summons by 4%.

Fine Tuning.baseDescription:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, not critically healing now increases your critical strike chance by 1%, stacking 10 times, until your next effective critical heal.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Bomb Toss and Firepot Drone by 10%.

3 Charges, 10 sec recharge
Build a Firepot Drone that flies towards your target, dropping a bomb along its path and exploding upon landing, dealing 182 + 17.5% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage in a 5 yd radius, leaving oil on the ground for 6 seconds that slows enemies within by -30%.

Firepot Drone and Scrap Shot now deal 2% increased damage for each stack of Napalm on the enemy.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

Build an Oil-Spill Pylon at target location for 10 seconds, spilling oil in an 8 yd radius that reduces enemies movement speed by -60% and increases their Fire damage taken by you by 15%.

Sticky Bomb Explosions and Firepot Drone deal 20% increased damage to enemies inside.
While in your Mechsuit, casting Sticky Bomb reduces the channel time of your next Gatling Gun within 5 seconds by -30%.

Graftbolts.baseDescription:
Level 40 Passive
Effective healing done now has a 25% chance to grant you GraftboltsGraftboltsRestores 15% maximum mana to your pet and increases the damage and healing done by your summons by a percentage equal to 10% of your healing spell power for 6 seconds..

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 50 Passive
Your Graftbolts now stacks 2 additional times.
Show off your Greatest Invention, healing party and raid members in a 30 yd radius for 823 + 65% healing every 2 sec for 9 seconds.

Overclock your pet for for 20 seconds, increasing its damage dealt by 20% and allowing it's attacks to trigger Hardwired Haymaker on the target enemy. 

Additionally, your pet will trigger Overclocked Smash every 5 sec.

Spider Bomb Factory now also summons a Heavy Spider Bomb.

Heavy Spider Bombs move slowly, and deal 1231 + 55% ranged AP Fire damage when they reach their target and slow their movement speed by -70% for 2 seconds.

Spider Bomb Factory now also summons a Heavy Spider Bomb.

Heavy Spider Bombs move slowly, and deal 1231 + 55% ranged AP Fire damage when they reach their target and slow their movement speed by -70% for 2 seconds.

I'm The Creator Now.baseDescription: Damage dealt by your summons now has a 40% chance to increase your attack power and spell power by 9 for 30 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Inventor's Tool Belt.baseDescription: Increases your and your pet's Intellect by 10% and you are both now unable to miss your attacks.

Kinetic Shield.baseDescription:
Create magnetic shields of kinetic energy on an ally target for 8 seconds, reducing damage taken by -40% and making them immune to stun effects.

Usable while stunned.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage reduced by Kinetic Shield by -10% and its duration by 2 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Kinetic Shield, Discombobulate!, and Repulsion Unit by -20%.

When you deal damage with Mechsuit: Laser Beam or Mechsuit: Combustion you now launch a Lesser Sticky Bomb on each target struck.Lesser Sticky BombThrows a bomb that sticks to the enemy for 3 sec.

At the end of the duration the bomb will explode, dealing 17 + 5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire Damage to the target.

While inside your Mechsuit, damage dealt by your Scrap Shot and Makeshift Dynamite now applies Living Flame to the target.Living Flame (Damage)Deals 32 Fire Damage every 2 sec and increases the damage the target takes from your Mechsuit: Combustion by 10% for 4.5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Allows Machine Synergy to stack 2 additional times and using Rocket Launcher now causes your Sentry Turret to also cast Rocket Launcher.Machine SynergyIncreases damage dealt by 5% and haste by 3%, stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

Create a macro-gravity zone at target location for 8 seconds.

Enemies within the zone have their movement speed slowed by -50% and gain 1 stack of Macro-Gravity every 1 sec.Macro-GravityAt 6 stacks, the affected enemy will be stunned for 6 seconds.

Makeshift Dynamite.baseDescription:
2 Charges, 8 sec recharge
Generates 10 Scrap
Load dynamite into your gun and launch it at an enemy, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 12 as Fire damage.

Usable while moving.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Makeshift Dynamite now resets the cooldown of your Mechsuit abilities.

Level 30 Passive
Your ranged damage dealt now has a 20% chance to refresh a charge of Makeshift Dynamite.

Makeshift Dynamite now marks enemies for 6 seconds. 

The next damaging ability used on this target by your pet consumes the mark to deal 491 + 20% fire SP + 20% ranged AP Fire damage.

While inside your Mechsuit, damage dealt by your Scrap Shot and Makeshift Dynamite now applies Living Flame to the target.Living Flame (Damage)Deals 32 Fire Damage every 2 sec and increases the damage the target takes from your Mechsuit: Combustion by 10% for 4.5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Mechanical Enhancements.baseDescription: Reduces your damage taken from bleed effects by -10% and the duration of bleed effects on you by -20%.

Mechaplating.baseDescription: Whenever your summons critically strike, reduce your and your pet's damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Makeshift Dynamite now resets the cooldown of your Mechsuit abilities.
Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosion and Mechsuit abilities by 30%.

Level 20 Passive
While in your Mechsuit, damage dealt by your summons now has a 20% chance to grant you 5 Scrap and 2% of your maximum mana.
When you enter your Mechsuit, it now refunds 20% of your base mana, repeating every 20 sec while inside.
While in your Mechsuit, casting Sticky Bomb reduces the channel time of your next Gatling Gun within 5 seconds by -30%.
Your Mechsuit will now increase your armor by an additional 50%.
Your Mechsuit now increases your damage by an additional 10% while active.
For 8 seconds after activating your Mechsuit, all damage dealt will now generate 3 Scrap.

Casting Scrap Shot and Mechsuit abilities now increases the chance to trigger Overload by 3% for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.

When Overload triggers, all stacks are consumed.

Level 40 Passive
Increases the effectiveness of your Mechsuit by 100%.
Increases the critical damage of your Mechsuit abilities by 15%.

While inside your Mechsuit, damage dealt by your Scrap Shot and Makeshift Dynamite now applies Living Flame to the target.Living Flame (Damage)Deals 32 Fire Damage every 2 sec and increases the damage the target takes from your Mechsuit: Combustion by 10% for 4.5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Scrap Shot and Mechsuit abilities now grants your Sentry Turret a stack of Master Technician, stacking 10 times.

At 10 stacks, your Sentry Turret will unleash a beam dealing 725 + 75% fire SP + 40% AP Fire damage in a 25 yd line, piercing invulnerabilities.

Casting Mechsuit abilities now causes your pet to enter a haywired state for 6 seconds.Haywired State!Auto attacks now zap up to 10 nearby enemies for 159 + 35% AP Stormstrike Damage and damaged enemies take 20% increased damage from your summons.

Mechsuit: Activate Jets.baseDescription:
Launch forward and slow your falling speed. 

When you hit the ground you blast nearby enemies for 275 Fire damage based on time in the air.

Mechsuit: Combustion.baseDescription:
Launch a massive ball of fire at an enemy that also damages nearby enemies, dealing 70 + 20% ranged AP Fire damage.

Usable while moving.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cast time of your Mechsuit: Combustion by 0.25 sec and its damage is increased by 20%.
Your Mechsuit: Combustion now has 10% increased critical strike chance and 15% increased critical damage.
Damage dealt by Mechsuit: Combustion and Mechsuit: Laser Beam now have a 40% chance to strike 2 additional times for 30% of the damage dealt.

When you deal damage with Mechsuit: Laser Beam or Mechsuit: Combustion you now launch a Lesser Sticky Bomb on each target struck.Lesser Sticky BombThrows a bomb that sticks to the enemy for 3 sec.

At the end of the duration the bomb will explode, dealing 17 + 5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire Damage to the target.

While inside your Mechsuit, damage dealt by your Scrap Shot and Makeshift Dynamite now applies Living Flame to the target.Living Flame (Damage)Deals 32 Fire Damage every 2 sec and increases the damage the target takes from your Mechsuit: Combustion by 10% for 4.5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Mechsuit: Laser Beam.baseDescription: Blast an enemy with a laser, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 18 as Fire Damage and forcing your pet to charge to the enemy for 24 Physical Damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Mechsuit: Combustion and Mechsuit: Laser Beam now have a 40% chance to strike 2 additional times for 30% of the damage dealt.

When you deal damage with Mechsuit: Laser Beam or Mechsuit: Combustion you now launch a Lesser Sticky Bomb on each target struck.Lesser Sticky BombThrows a bomb that sticks to the enemy for 3 sec.

At the end of the duration the bomb will explode, dealing 17 + 5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire Damage to the target.

Med Pack.baseDescription: Toss a med pack to an ally, healing for 204 + 120% SP over 6 seconds and cleanses all bleed, poison and disease effects.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the cooldown of Med Pack by 30 sec, but allows it to affect up to 4 additional targets around your ally.
Increases the duration of Med Pack by 100% and it's healing by 75%.
Increases the duration of your Beacons by 5 sec and Med Pack by 3 sec.
Effective healing with Stim Augmentation now reduces the cooldown of Med Pack by -3 sec.
Increases the critical strike chance of Emergency Heal by 15% and allows the periodic healing done by Med Pack to critically strike.
Increases the effectiveness of your Modules by 20%.

Upgrade nearby Sentry Turrets to a Molten Grenade Turret for 1 minute.Molten Grenade TurretUpgrades the Sentry Turret to fire grenades, increasing its attack speed significantly and causing it to deal 133 Fire Damage in an 8 yd radius, plus an additional 95 + 15% fire SP + 8.5% AP Fire Damage over 1.5 seconds.
Casting Beacon abilities now reduces the cooldown of My Greatest Invention! by -20 sec.

Nano-Repair Tech.baseDescription: You and your pet now regenerate 3% of your maximum health every 8 sec.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the tick rate and healing done of Nanobot Reconstruction by 20%.
Periodic healing done by Nanobot Reconstruction now restores 27 + 4.03% healing health to 5 allied players within 10 yds of the affected target.

Send Nanobots to an ally, healing them for 420 over 1 minute.

Nanobot Reconstruction can only be sent to 1 target at a time and cannot be dispelled.

Send Nanobots to an ally, dealing 15 + 17.1% SP damage to nearby enemies every 4 sec for 1 minute. All threat generated by you is redirected to the target.

Nanobot Swarm can only be sent to 1 target at time and cannot be dispelled.
Reduces the mana cost of your Nanobots by -10% and they now last 10 additional sec.
Nanobots now grant a 30% chance to resist movement impairing effects for 15 seconds.

Send Nanobots to an ally removing 1 poison and disease effect every 3 sec for up to 15 seconds.

Nanobot Cleanser can only be sent to 1 target at a time and can't be dispelled.
Your Zap! is now guaranteed to critically strike allies affected by Nanobots.

Level 10 Passive
Dealing direct Fire damage now applies Napalm to your target.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

When Overload triggers, all stacks are consumed.

Your Piercing Augmentation now ignores an additional 10% of your target's armor and grants you -10 increased spell penetration.

Refined Gunpowder.baseDescription: Increases your haste and your damage dealt against Mechanical creatures by 6%.

modifyingTalents.description: Critical strikes with Zap! now apply Rejuvenating Gas to up to 12 allies within 8 yards of your target that restores 15% of the value of the shot as health every 2 sec for 10 seconds.

You now spawn 2 Shrapnel Mines under your target when Sticky Bomb explodes.

Fires a long range zap of electricity that heals an ally for 254 + 150% healing.

Scales with modifiers to Repair Shot.

Build a Repulsion Unit that periodically knocks nearby enemies back every 5 sec for 20 seconds.
Reduces the cooldown of Kinetic Shield, Discombobulate!, and Repulsion Unit by -20%.
Fire critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of Rockadier by -3 sec.

Rocket Boots.baseDescription:
3 Charges, 30 sec recharge
Activate your Rocket Boots, dispelling root effects and launching you forward.

modifyingTalents.description:
Falling below 35% health now refreshes all charges of Rocket Boots.

Can occur only once every 3 min.

Scrapshielding.baseDescription: Your critical strikes now grant you a shield that absorbs 177 + 15% AP + 60% SP damage.

Self-Sustaining Technology.baseDescription:
Damage or healing done by your pet or summons now heals you equal to 15% of the value. 

In addition, damage or healing done by you now restores health and mana to your pet equal to 15% of the value. 

Each of these effects can only occur once per sec.

Build: Spider Bomb now creates an additional Spider Bomb that rushes towards your target.

Build a Spider Bomb Factory in front of you for 20 seconds.

For the duration, Bomb Toss and Rocket Launcher will summon 3 Spider Bombs, that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage.

Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

Spider Bomb Factory now also summons a Heavy Spider Bomb.

Heavy Spider Bombs move slowly, and deal 1231 + 55% ranged AP Fire damage when they reach their target and slow their movement speed by -70% for 2 seconds.

Build a Spider Bomb that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage in an 8 yd radius.

Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

Build a Spider Bomb Factory in front of you for 20 seconds.

For the duration, Bomb Toss and Rocket Launcher will summon 3 Spider Bombs, that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage.

Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.
Reduces the cooldown of Sticky Bomb and Deploy Blast Mine by -2 sec.
Casting Sticky Bomb now causes your Sentry Turret to fire a rocket cluster on its next attack, causing 126 Fire damage to enemies within 5 yds of the target.
Casting Sticky Bomb now causes your next 2 Scrap Shots within 10 seconds to cast -50% faster and deal 25% increased damage.
When Rocket Launcher is used on enemies affected by Sticky Bomb it is now guaranteed to critically strike.

You now spawn 2 Shrapnel Mines under your target when Sticky Bomb explodes.
Shrapnel MineWhen you use Remote Detonation, deal 264 + 25% AP + 38.5% SP Physical damage to up to 5 enemies within 10 yds. The mine lasts 1 minute.

Level 30 Passive
While Bombastic is active, your Bomb Tosses will additionally reduce the cooldown of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec.

Unleash a barrage of shrapnel, dealing 831 + 36% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage to enemies in a line, applying a lesser Sticky Bomb to each target struck that deals 297 + 10% fire SP + 50% AP Fire damage after 3 sec.

After 3 seconds, your active Sentry Turret will also fire a Hyperblast Barrage.
Increases the detonation speed of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec and reduces its cooldown by -2 sec.
While in your Mechsuit, casting Sticky Bomb reduces the channel time of your next Gatling Gun within 5 seconds by -30%.
Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosion and Mechsuit abilities by 30%.
Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosions by 15%.
Your Sticky Bomb Explosions and Spider Bomb now deal 30% increased damage when it strikes only 1 target.

Build an Oil-Spill Pylon at target location for 10 seconds, spilling oil in an 8 yd radius that reduces enemies movement speed by -60% and increases their Fire damage taken by you by 15%.

Sticky Bomb Explosions and Firepot Drone deal 20% increased damage to enemies inside.

Stim Augmentation.baseDescription: Add a Stim Augmentation to your gun for 1 hour, causing your direct healing abilities to heal up to 3 nearby friendly players for an additional 20% of the amount healed.

modifyingTalents.description: Effective healing with Stim Augmentation now reduces the cooldown of Med Pack by -3 sec.
Healing from Stim Augmentation now affects 2 additional allies near the primary target.
Your Stim Augmentation now heals for an additional 10% of the amount healed.
Air Strike now drops Tear Gas, dealing 132 + 11% nature SP + 100% AP Nature damage every 2 sec for 12 seconds.

Technician.baseDescription: Reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 70% and increases your critical healing by 20%.

The BIG Guns!.baseDescription:
Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your ranged attack power by 3%.

Tracer Augmentation.baseDescription:
Add a Tracer Augmentation to your gun for 1 hour, causing your ranged attacks to mark enemies for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times. After the duration they explode for 80 + 8% ranged AP + 15% fire SP Fire damage, increased based on stacks.

Marked enemies are prevented from entering stealth or invisibility for 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Explosive Augmentation and Tracer Augmentation now has a 50% chance to apply an additional stack of Napalm to enemies.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.
Direct harmful ability critical strikes now apply an additional stack of Tracer Augmentation to the target while active on the enemy.

Increases the amount of stacks of Tracer Augmentation by 5, and its duration by 7 sec, and causes damage dealt by Bomb Toss on enemies with 10 stacks to launch a Rocket Barrage at their location.Rocket Barrage (Damage)Deals 1290 + 17.5% AP + 11% fire SP Fire Damage to nearby enemies after 5 seconds.

Ventilation.baseDescription: Direct magic damage taken now has a 50% chance to increase all magic resistances of allies within 8 yds of you by 15 for 6 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Teaches you Build: ZIGGI-6K.Build: ZIGGI-6KBuild ZIGGI-6K, the latest in regenerative technology, to aid you in healing allies until dismissed.
Critical strikes with Zap! now apply Rejuvenating Gas to up to 12 allies within 8 yards of your target that restores 15% of the value of the shot as health every 2 sec for 10 seconds.
Reduces the cooldown of Zap! by -5 sec.
Your Zap! is now guaranteed to critically strike allies affected by Nanobots.
Zap! now causes your active Build abilities to zap the lowest health nearby ally, healing them for 490 + 90% healing.
